headline: Nvidia’s Next Huge Bet: Drill, Baby, Drill!
summary: SLB (NYSE:SLB) and NVIDIA (NASDAQ:NVDA) have collaborated for roughly two decades, and their partnership just took center stage on CNBC. SLB CEO Olivier Le Peuch sat down with Jim Cramer on June 18, 2026 to walk through the company’s digital investor day and explain how AI is rewiring the oil patch into something that looks ...
